ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaults" (
  "vault_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vault */,
  "vault_address" TEXT /* Address of the vault */,
  "tvl" REAL /* Total value locked in the vault */,
  "token0_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the first token in the vault */,
  "token1_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the second token in the vault */,
  "allowed_token" TEXT /* Symbol of the allowed token in the vault */,
  "vault_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the vault */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vault was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vault was last updated */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy used by the vault */,
  "days_since_first_deposit" INTEGER /* Number of days since the first deposit was made to the vault */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the vault (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vault_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "token_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the token */,
  "token_name" TEXT /* Name of the token */,
  "token_decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the token */,
  "token_contract_address" TEXT /* Smart contract address of the token */,
  "token_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the token's logo */,
  "token_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "vault_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vault the investment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token used for the investment */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "expected_return_rate" REAL /* Expected return rate of the investment */,
  "actual_return_rate" REAL /* Actual return rate of the investment */,
  "investment_period" TEXT /* Period for which the investment is made (e.g., 30 days, 60 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_vault_id FOREIGN KEY ("vault_id") REFERENCES vaults ("vault_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment return */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment the return belongs to */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount of the return */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of return (e.g., interest, dividend) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_returns_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flows" (
  "cash_flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cash flow */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment the cash flow belongs to */,
  "cash_flow_date" TEXT /* Date the cash flow was made */,
  "cash_flow_amount" REAL /* Amount of the cash flow */,
  "flow_type" TEXT /* Type of cash flow (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "flow_status" TEXT /* Status of the cash flow (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cash_flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_flows_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matching" (
  "matching_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matching opportunity */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment the matching opportunity belongs to */,
  "vault_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vault the matching opportunity belongs to */,
  "matching_date" TEXT /* Date the matching opportunity was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the matching opportunity (e.g., pending, matched, declined) */,
  "investment_period" TEXT /* Period for which the investment is being matched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matching_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matching_vault_id FOREIGN KEY ("vault_id") REFERENCES vaults ("vault_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matching_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matching_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matching criteria */,
  "matching_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matching opportunity the criteria belongs to */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the criteria */,
  "criteria_value" TEXT /* Value of the criteria */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the matching criteria was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the matching criteria was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matching_criteria_matching_id FOREIGN KEY ("matching_id") REFERENCES matching ("matching_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_profiles" (
  "risk_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the risk profile belongs to */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the user */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the risk profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the risk profile was last updated */,
  "investment_horizon" TEXT /* Investment horizon of the user (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
